positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene under a crescent moon. The style should be modern flat design mixed with fine line etching details, giving it depth and sophistication. Center composition featuring three stylized trees with unique, curving silhouettes (e.g., weeping willows, stylized oak). The ground should be rendered with simple, continuous patterns. Color palette is muted nocturnal tones: deep indigo, teal, pale silver, and pops of warm, glowing gold (representing fireflies and moonlight). Focus on extreme clean lines and strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the illuminated areas. The overall composition must be highly print-ready, scalable, and easily readable on fabric. Studio light, perfect vector quality, high contrast, symmetrical balance.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, low quality, dirty, complex, realistic photo, photorealistic, gradients, shadows, poorly drawn, smudge, logo
